subject: [RFC PATCH v4 07/27] mm/madvise: skip madvise for managed-memory folios

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: The patch author has not posted any substantive follow-up replies yet.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes to skip madvise operations for managed-memory folios, specifically private node folios that are managed by device drivers. The existing zone_device check is extended to cover these private nodes.
